I EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
I.1 Products covered by this document 
This document describes the quality of the  CMEMS Mediterranean Sea (MED) and Black Sea 
(BS) diurnal gap-free (optimally interpolated, Level-4) Sea Surface T emperature ( SST) 
products (Table 1) , developed by CNR (Consiglio Nazionale delle Ricerche, Italian National 
Research Council , Italy) , throughout a careful comparison with in situ data of the variable  
provided: 
 * analysed_sst – hourly, optimally interpolated (L4) sub-skin SST 
 
Product Name/Dataset Name Production Unit 
SST_MED_PHY_SUBSKIN_L4_NRT_010_036/ 
cmems_obs-sst_med_phy-sst_nrt_diurnal-oi-0.0625deg_PT1H-m 
CNR (Roma) 
SST_BS_PHY_SUBSKIN_L4_NRT_010_035/ 
cmems_obs-sst_blk_phy-sst_nrt_diurnal-oi-0.0625deg_PT1H-m 
CNR (Roma) 
Table 1. CMEMS Mediterranean Sea and Black Sea diurnal (hourly mean) L4 SST datasets. 
 
These two diurnal products provide daily gap-free (L4) maps of hourly mean sub -skin SST at 
0.0625 deg. (1/16°) horizontal resolution by combining infrared satellite and model data. 
MED (SST_MED_PHY_SUBSKIN_L4_NRT_010_036) and BS 
(SST_BS_PHY_SUBSKIN_L4_NRT_010_035) diurnal products are available since 1st Janu ary 
2019 and since 1st January 2020 up to near-real time (-14H), respectively. 
The sub-skin temperature is the temperature at the base of the thermal skin layer and

catalog_entry.summary: This document describes the quality of CMEMS Mediterranean Sea and Black Sea diurnal gap-free Sea Surface Temperature products, developed by CNR through a comparison with in situ data.
